metadata.description: A personal Claude Code plugin marketplace — skills, MCP servers, and tools for everyday use.

plugins.name: terse
plugins.description: Terse communication mode. Drops filler and pleasantries, keeps grammar and full technical accuracy. Always active.

plugins.name: english-learning
plugins.description: English learning skills for B2-level learners. Includes vocabulary lookup, sentence translation, exam solving, and a fill-in-the-blank quiz with Anki export.

plugins.name: md-polish
plugins.description: Polishes Markdown files by fixing typos, punctuation, and consistency without rewriting content.

plugins.name: cmdref
plugins.description: Quick Linux command reference. Given a command name or screenshot, shows the most common usage patterns with concise examples in English.
